description: Wireframe-to-DS agent — maps screen descriptions to DS component combinations and outputs CSpec YAML for Bridge.
notes: Bridge must be set up before this agent can map to real DS components.
Run '/design-workflow setup' in Bridge to index the DS from the active Figma file.
All CSpec YAML output must pass through lib/compiler/compile.ts before execution.
No Figma API token required — Bridge connects via the MCP server.
